meanings.definition: abnormal hardening or thickening of tissue
the process of becoming hard or solid by cooling or drying or crystallization
examples: he tested the set of the glue

meanings.definition: the act of making something harder (firmer or tighter or more compact)
harden by reheating and cooling in oil

examples: This trip will season even the hardiest traveller

meanings.definition: cause to accept or become hardened to; habituate
examples: He was inured to the cold
